aimodels.description: Multimodal LLM accepting any combination of text, audio, and image inputs.

aimodels.description: State-of-the-art LLM featuring advanced reasoning, coding, and writing capabilities.

aimodels.description: Open-access large language model optimized for dialogue and engineering use cases.
aimodels.creator: Meta AI

aimodels.name: Stable Diffusion
aimodels.description: Latent text-to-image diffusion model capable of generating photo-realistic images.
aimodels.creator: Stability AI

aimodels.description: Generative AI model focused on highly artistic and stylized image creation from text.
aimodels.creator: Midjourney Inc.

aimodels.name: Whisper
aimodels.description: General-purpose speech recognition and transcription model trained on diverse audio.
aimodels.creator: OpenAI

aimodels.name: AlphaFold
aimodels.description: AI model that predicts the 3D structure of proteins and molecular complexes with high accuracy.
aimodels.creator: Google DeepMind

aimodels.name: Mistral Large
aimodels.description: Top-tier open-weights text generation model with leading multilingual capacities.

aimodels.name: DeepSeek-V3

aimodels.name: Sora
